name: Laval Lancelord
name_jp: ラヴァル・ランスロッド
desc: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If you do, during the End Phase: Send it to the Graveyard. When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 of your banished FIRE monsters; add that target to your hand.
mnst_eff: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If you do, during the End Phase: Send it to the Graveyard. When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 of your banished FIRE monsters; add that target to your hand.
eff: You can Normal Summon this card without Tributing. If you do, during the End Phase: Send it to the Graveyard. When this card on the field is destroyed and sent to the Graveyard: You can target 1 of your banished FIRE monsters; add that target to your hand.

sets.set: Onslaught of the Fire Kings Structure Deck

jp_sets.set: Structure Deck: Onslaught of the Fire Kings

action: Sends itself from field to Graveyard
Adds banished cards to the hand
